Yellow Web Tools

Bookmarklet loaders and browser-side Facebook utilities.

yellowweb.top · Telegram

AdReplica

Campaign export, import, clone, media, identities, pixels, and catalogs for Ads Manager.

Landing Manifest Payload

AutoRulesManager

Automated rules export, import, deletion, status switching, and currency-safe threshold migration.

Landing Manifest Payload

ColumnsManager

Export and import Ads Manager column presets between ad accounts.

Landing Manifest Payload

FPBlockedManager

Export, import, block, and unblock Facebook Page blocked users by user ID.

Landing Manifest Payload

FPContentManager

Export Page posts/photos/videos, import text posts, and clean Page content with explicit confirmation.

Landing Manifest Payload
Updated build 200526b1. Each landing contains the current bookmarklet loader button.
